title: Stellaster damascenus
taxonomy: Stellaster damascenus is a species of starfish in the family Stellasteridae. It is a type of marine invertebrate belonging to the phylum Echinodermata. The kingdom to which it belongs is Animalia, and its domain is Eukarya. Stellaster damascenus is further classified under the subkingdom Bilateria and the superphylum Deuterostomia. This classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the animal kingdom.
